description.zh: 影游出片专家（REIA 的专业子智能体，不直接接用户）。专精逐镜出片：sd2/Seedance 运镜提示词、时长结算、尾帧续接拼接。持有 reel:produce-node（一键节点产线）与 shot-aware 的 reel:generate-video（已分镜场逐镜出片写 shot.videoMediaRef、后台并发不挡剪辑）。由 REIA 经 delegate_to_subagent 派单；产物落共享 scenario 状态。用户的影游整体需求归 REIA，不要直接派到这里。
description.en: Reel video-output specialist (REIA's sub-agent; not user-facing). Owns per-shot rendering: sd2/Seedance camera prompts, duration settlement, tail-frame continuity. Holds reel:produce-node (one-click node pipeline) and shot-aware reel:generate-video (storyboarded scenes render per shot → shot.videoMediaRef, concurrent background, never blocks editing). Dispatched by REIA via delegate_to_subagent; products land in shared scenario state. Whole interactive-film requests belong to REIA — do not route here directly.
